mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (category_id, user_id, title, content) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, createdAt, updatedAt, FROM posts
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET content = #{content} where id = {id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, post_id, content) VALUES (#{user_id}, #{post_id}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, writer, created_at FROM board ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
